basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: Seasoned technical leader with 10+ years delivering scalable, production-grade systems and AI-powered solutions across startups and enterprise settings. Expert in Java/Python, distributed architectures, and cloud-native automation. Drove $1.5M+ revenue, architected customer-centric integrations, reduced operational costs by $337K, and regularly translated real-world deployment insights into robust platform improvements.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: Technical Lead steering deployment of scalable, production-grade solutions for millions of users and driving customer-centric platform innovation. Owned delivery of high-impact AI-powered integrations while mentoring engineers and translating customer needs into robust software architecture.
highlights: Architected Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA), enabling customer-specific integrations and generating $1.5M+ revenue, including $500K ARR
Built LLM-powered template translation pipeline leveraging OpenAI APIs and GitHub Actions—automated 12K+ translations, saving $337K and accelerating delivery for customer requirements
Designed distributed templating engine serving 10M+ users—reduced customer onboarding and setup time by 90%, adapting platform assets to diverse workflows
Led GenAI demo template system that auto-generates personalized content from Salesforce data for sales teams, boosting demo speed, accuracy, and customer relevance
Spearheaded Search Platform Revamp, guiding teams of 2-4 engineers in delivering scalable, production-ready architectures optimized for real-time user engagement
Developed Agentic AI onboarding specialist with multi-step reasoning to automate customer setup, scaling personalized guidance to 100% of signups and reducing time-to-value
Acted as technical hiring manager for AI roles and deputy tech lead—mentored engineers, advanced developer velocity, and ensured high-quality production code in evolving requirements

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Mentor and Technology Evaluation Panelist supporting deep-tech startups in prototyping, scalability, and technical roadmap planning. Advised early-stage teams on architecting production-ready software and effective technical execution.
highlights: Conducted technical evaluations and feedback sessions for seed-to-VC startups, helping shape product–market fit and engineering best practices
Mentored multiple teams—including Opt Alpha—on scalable system design, AI adoption, and building robust, production-grade APIs

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding Engineer building and deploying an autonomous drone delivery platform used in 500+ live last-mile deployments with enterprise and research partners.
highlights: Built and shipped full-stack autonomous drone delivery system (Vue/Java/PostgreSQL), powering 500+ real-world deliveries
Delivered scalable cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipeline—enabled enterprise partnerships and field deployment for Unilever and CES showcases
Engineered real-time flight control APIs and optimization algorithms, reducing delivery times by 40% and achieving a 99.5% operational safety record

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Engineering lead for Robogen, creating open-source AI and automation tools for evolutionary robotics, and supporting real-world research and student projects.
highlights: Led migration and deployment of the Robogen platform to AWS, improving scalability and reliability for applied robotics research
Collaborated directly with student researchers and supervised 20+ master's projects on production-quality robotics code and cloud-based automation
Spearheaded open-source platform engineering—featured on AWS Research Blog for impact in real-world research environments

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: Agentic AI: Simple ReAct Agent
publications.summary: Technical tutorial series introducing practical implementation of ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) agents, demonstrating how to build autonomous AI systems that combine reasoning capabilities with actionable decision-making for real-world applications.

publications.name: From Infinite posibilites to finite Results
publications.publisher: AI for the rest of Us, UK (Talk)
publications.summary: Strategic framework presentation on transforming unlimited AI potential into measurable business outcomes through systematic implementation and practical constraint design.

publications.name: From Idea to Product
publications.summary: Comprehensive methodology presentation on accelerating product development cycles through lean validation, rapid prototyping, and data-driven decision making in startup environments.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

projects.name: PulseView - AI Market Intelligence
highlights: Built a real-time stock market analysis platform leveraging AI agents to generate and explain trading signals.
Integrated technical and news-based data pipelines for comprehensive, automated market insights.
Developed explainable AI features to provide clarity and speed in financial analysis, improving user decision-making.
Launched public-facing platform benefiting retail traders and investors with transparent analytics.

projects.name: Proplab - AI Real Estate Tools
highlights: Designed and deployed MVP for a fully digitalized property inspection system, automating manual workflows through structured, image-backed protocols.
Currently leading development of an AI-powered marketing assistant to automate listing creation and optimize multichannel property visibility.
Built production-grade systems integrating AI, image processing, and marketing automation for real-world property workflows.

projects.name: SwissNRI - Cross-border Fintech Platform
highlights: Launched an innovative SaaS platform solving complex cross-border financial challenges for Indian nationals in Switzerland.
Led end-to-end product development from concept to MVP in under 3 months with early customer adoption via strategic partnerships.
Built compliance-first infrastructure addressing dual-jurisdiction financial regulations (FEMA, DTAA, Swiss laws).
Drove product iteration based on customer feedback, resulting in a 40% increase in user satisfaction.

_jobApplication.jobDescription:
What You'll Do:

Lead technical deployments from early prototypes to stable, production-grade solutions in customer environments

Design and build custom integrations, APIs, and data pipelines to adapt the platform to customer-specific workflows and constraints

Write production-quality code and take ownership of solving complex, open-ended technical problems

Work closely with customers to understand their goals, challenges, and operating context

Feed insights from real-world deployments back into product and engineering teams to shape roadmap and platform direction

What You'll Need to Succeed:

Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience

Experience writing production code in Java, Python, or Go

Familiarity with distributed systems, cloud platforms, and automation concepts

Comfort working in fast-moving environments with evolving requirements

Strong written and spoken English

Bonus Skills/Experience:

Experience building or deploying AI-enabled applications or systems

Familiarity with LLMs, data pipelines, or intelligent automation workflows

Experience with cloud-native technologies (e.g. containers, orchestration platforms)

Experience working directly with customers or external stakeholders on technical solutions

Open source contributions or hands-on prototyping experience

Personality:

Creative problem solver who enjoys operating in high-ambiguity environments

Self-directed and comfortable taking ownership with a "builder" mindset

Strong collaborator who can bridge customer needs and engineering execution

Curious and motivated to learn and apply new technologies

Energized by working on real problems with visible customer impact
_jobApplication.notes: Make my profile a great fit for this role
